User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the Secure Assessment Gateway, distinguishing between administrators and students.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The email address of the user, used for identification.

username.description: The chosen display name or username of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the system (e.g., 'admin', 'student').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

Exam.title: Exam
Exam.description: Defines a multiple-choice examination, including its structure, time limits, and passing criteria.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Exam entity.

description.description: A brief description or instructions for the exam.

timeLimitMinutes.description: The maximum time allowed to complete the exam, in minutes.

passingScore.description: The minimum score required to pass this exam.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User (admin) who created this exam.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents a single multiple-choice question belonging to an exam.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Question entity.

examId.description: Reference to the Exam this question belongs to.

questionText.description: The main text of the multiple-choice question.

options.description: An ordered list of possible answer options for the question.

correctOptionIndex.description: The zero-based index of the correct answer.

Result.title: Result
Result.description: Stores the outcome of a student's attempt at an exam.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Result entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the User (student) who took the exam.

examId.description: Reference to the Exam that was attempted.

startedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the student started the exam.

completedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the student completed the exam.

definition.description: Stores core profile information for each user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique identifier of the administrator.

params.name: examId
params.description: The unique identifier for the exam.

definition.description: Stores individual questions for an exam.

params.name: examId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent exam.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the question.

definition.description: Stores the outcome and details of a student's attempt.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student.

params.name: resultId
params.description: The unique identifier for the exam result.
